who: medical clinic billing managers processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For medical clinic billing managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient handling of patient billing disputes causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate disputes and generate summary reports instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient handling of patient billing disputes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing managers
Indie Hackers discussions on related workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 billing managers with demo
Engage in community forums for billing tools
try_it: Let users try dispute aggregation tool on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
